title: Neural Network Programming with Java Second Edition
author: Alan M. F. Souza, Fabio M. Soares
description: Create and unleash the power of neural networks by implementing professional, clean, and clear Java codeAbout This Book* Learn to build amazing projects using neural networks including forecasting the weather and pattern recognition* Explore the Java multi-platform feature to run your personal neural networks everywhere* This step-by-step guide will help you solve real-world problems and links neural network theory to their applicationWho This Book Is ForThis book is for Java developers who want
